title: Fix ARGS parsing for run commands
body:
Currently we are not adding the ARGS passed in via Dockerfile
or --build-args into the running container as environment variables.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Overall changes LGTM.  Do we need to add a --args option to `buildah config`?
I don't think so, args is not configuration for the container image, it is more about passing args around in a Dockerfile.

:pushpin: Commit fde49ec has been approved by `umohnani8`
